name: Customer 360 Denormalized Table
description: Build a pre-aggregated customer summary table combining sales history and product preferences

checks.name: customer_360 has 3 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM customer_360;

checks.name: Alice lifetime sales = 1209.92
checks.query: SELECT total_lifetime_sales FROM customer_360 WHERE customer_id = 1;

checks.name: Alice has 2 distinct orders
checks.query: SELECT total_orders FROM customer_360 WHERE customer_id = 1;

checks.name: Carol's favorite category is Electronics
checks.query: SELECT favorite_category FROM customer_360 WHERE customer_id = 3;
